call_analysis.call_summary: Patient Sarah Mitchell called to schedule a routine cleaning. Appointment was scheduled for Tuesday at 9 AM.

call.transcript:
Agent: Thank you for calling Downtown Dental, this is Rover. How can I help you today?
User: Hi, my name is Sarah Mitchell. I need to schedule a cleaning.
Agent: Of course! We have Tuesday at 9 AM available. Does that work for you?
User: That sounds perfect, thank you!
Agent: Great, you're all set for Tuesday at 9 AM.

transcript_object.content: Thank you for calling Downtown Dental, this is Rover. How can I help you today?
Hi, my name is Sarah Mitchell. I need to schedule a cleaning.
Of course! We have Tuesday at 9 AM available. Does that work for you?
Great, you're all set for Tuesday at 9 AM.
